home.hero.subtitle: Grow physically and mentally stronger, boost your confidence and get to know yourself! Training in Resilience, Self-Defence and/or Wing Chun Kung Fu for young and old.

about.title: Who is Revand?
about.intro.p1: Revand Physical Training was founded by Ruben van Dijk, a trainer based in Haarlem with a passion for self-defence, resilience and personal growth. With a background of over ten years in Wing Chun Kung Fu and seven years of teaching experience — at primary schools, sports centres and companies — he knows what people need to develop physically and mentally.
about.intro.p2: Revand is more than a physical trainer. The focus is on relaxation, positive energy and bringing out your inner strength. Participants work within their own level and limits. You are free to be yourself, taking your own steps towards becoming stronger and more confident.
about.intro.p3: Training is available for children, young people and adults, in groups, as a duo or as private training. Always tailored, always with attention to the person behind the participant.
about.wingchun.title: What is Wing Chun / Ving Tsun?
about.wingchun.text1: Wing Chun Kung Fu is a no-nonsense martial art based on relaxation, explosiveness and the structure of the body and the biomechanics of human anatomy. This makes it suitable for everyone — the laws of physics apply to us all. By drawing as much power as possible from this structure and applying biomechanics correctly, the practitioner relies less on muscle strength. This makes Wing Chun ideal for people who are smaller or less strong than their opponent.
about.wingchun.text2: Ruben has over ten years of experience in Wing Chun. His knowledge was gained at Sportcentrum Wu Dae under Sifu Edwin Piepenbrock. Both follow the GE Ving Tsun system of Göksel Erdogan, whose school is in Stuttgart, Germany. This grandmaster has thoroughly revised and refined the system into a completely solid, physics-based framework.

services.title: What does Revand offer?
services.intro: Whether you want to become more resilient mentally and physically, learn to know and defend your boundaries, or discover and integrate the technical art of Wing Chun Kung Fu — at Revand you'll find a training that suits you. All training is suitable for all ages and can be followed in group sessions, as a duo or as private training.
services.resilience.title: Resilience
services.resilience.desc: Learn to recognise and defend your boundaries, speak up and stand firm. Our resilience training combines physical exercises with awareness and confidence building.
services.selfdef.title: Self-Defence
services.selfdef.desc: Practical self-defence you can apply straight away. We train situational awareness, posture and effective techniques. No prior experience required.
services.wingchun.title: Wing Chun Kung Fu
services.wingchun.desc: Wing Chun is a Chinese martial art focused on efficiency, timing and body awareness. Revand offers both beginner classes and in-depth training for those with experience. Available as a group class, duo or private training.
services.formats.title: Formats
services.formats.item1: One-off workshop (also available as a birthday party with a Kung Fu theme)
services.formats.item2: Course over multiple days or weeks
services.formats.item3: Long-term training for those who want to grow structurally
services.forwhom.title: Who is it for?
services.forwhom.desc: Revand trains youth and adults. We come on-site to primary schools, secondary schools, after-school care and companies. Private training and duo sessions are also possible. Near you or at our fixed location in Haarlem Noord.
services.wudae.title: Wu Dae Sportcentrum
services.wudae.desc: Visit the Wu Dae website for many more group classes to develop your body and mind.
contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: Have a question, want to know more about a specific training, or curious what Revand can do for your school, company or child? Feel free to get in touch. We are happy to think along with you.
